sourceTitle: 上海交通大学关于在教育教学中使用 AI 的规范（试行版）
queryUsed: site:sjtu.edu.cn AI 工具 学生 作业
verificationNotes: Official university-wide AI usage policy document (trial version) published March 2025. Comprehensive governance framework covering teachers, students, AI products/services, and stakeholders. Establishes four-tier usage classification: prohibited, limited, encouraged, and open use.
